stemHtml:
Which of the following occurances would cause the auto-pilot to automatically disengage in a non FBW aircraft?

1. Pilot activation of the trim switch
2. Hydraulic system failure
3. Failure of an IRS
4. Overshooting the localizer
5. Cutting out the stabilizer trim
6. Loss of flight director
7. Undercarriage extension
8. Loss of ILS signal during auto-coupled approach
